race.comment: The well-related ADRANOS (4) (half to G2 winner Tiamo Grace) goes well for rider Maloney who has a win and five placings from nine steers and doesn't know how to put in a poor one. Has only missed a drum once in seven spins around this circuit and should be right there when the whips are cracking. WHISPERING ROGUE (3) also hails from a handy family (half to 2xG2 winner and G1 placed Whispering Brook) and should be up to the mark following two recent trials. Respect any market confidence. MOSHULU SPIRIT (7) was a dominant Sunny Coast winner when resuming and will have taken a bunch of confidence from that victory. Can go back-to-back without surprising. TORO CHASE (9) gets in well at the weights with the 3kg claim and may earn some minor money.
